div1.entryFree: Avenge, to revenge: remember to a. me on the French, H6A I, 4, 94. shall I not live to be --d on her? H6B I, 3, 85. and be --d on cursed Tamora, Tit. V, 1, 16. till Caesar's three and thirty wounds be well --d, Caes. V, 1, 54. Used of divine retribution: O God! if thou wilt be --d on my misdeeds, R3 I, 4, 70. if God will be --d for this deed, 221 (Qq revenged).
